header.title: Somnus Power Menu
header.desc: Customize the appearance of the power menu

iconColor.label: Icon color
iconColor.desc: Color of the power icon in the bar

hoverColor.label: Hover color
hoverColor.desc: Color when hovering over a button

buttonSpacing.label: Button spacing
buttonSpacing.desc: Distance between buttons in the grid

useOverlay.label: Screen overlay mode
useOverlay.desc: When enabled, the menu covers the full screen. When disabled, the menu appears as a centered panel.

overlayBlur.label: Overlay blur
overlayBlur.desc: Blur intensity when the menu covers the full screen.

overlayTint.label: Overlay tint
overlayTint.desc: Darkness of the overlay on top of the blurred background.

panelTint.label: Panel tint
panelTint.desc: Darkness of the centered panel background.

animationsEnabled.label: Button animations
animationsEnabled.desc: When disabled, buttons appear instantly without entry or hover animations.

lockOnSuspend.label: Lock on suspend
lockOnSuspend.desc: When enabled, the screen locks before suspending. When disabled, the system suspends without locking.

hoverDesaturation.label: Hover desaturation
hoverDesaturation.desc: Reduces color intensity on hover. Higher values make the hover color appear more gray.
